target.title: [Bug]: Codex Computer Use get_app_state hangs awaiting tools/call from Discord-routed session
target.body:
### Bug type

Crash (process/app exits or hangs)

### Beta release blocker

No

### Summary

On current `openclaw/main`, a Discord/OpenClaw-routed Codex Computer Use call to `computer-use.get_app_state` for Chrome reaches the MCP tool invocation but hangs until the 120s `tools/call` timeout, even from a clean helper-client baseline.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Build current `openclaw/main` at `7844b0844568f8f71040008ef596bc715064657b` (`OpenClaw 2026.6.10`) on macOS.
2. Run an isolated canary gateway/profile from that build. In my repro this used loopback port `18799` and an isolated `~/.openclaw-canary` profile; the production gateway was not changed.
3. Use an OpenClaw Discord-routed Codex agent turn with the Computer Use plugin/tooling available.
4. Ensure the helper process baseline is clean before the second attempt: no stale `SkyComputerUseClient mcp` helpers, only `SkyComputerUseService` remains.
5. Ask the agent to call Computer Use directly for Chrome app state, not a shell/browser/screenshot fallback:

   ```text
   Use the Computer Use tool to get the app state for Google Chrome
   (app identifier com.google.Chrome if supported). Do not use shell,
   browser automation, or screenshots as a substitute.
   ```

6. Observe the `computer-use/get_app_state` tool call hang until timeout.

### Expected behavior

The Computer Use call should either return Chrome app state or return a clear actionable Computer Use error. It should not hang until the Codex/MCP `tools/call` timeout after the approval bridge has already been exercised.

### Actual behavior

The live canary call failed twice with a 120s `tools/call` timeout.

First canary session:

```text
tool call error: tool call failed for `computer-use/get_app_state`

Caused by:
    timed out awaiting tools/call after 120s
```

Corresponding assistant result:

```text
CU_CANARY_RESULT status=failure detail=computer-use/get_app_state for com.google.Chrome timed out after 120s awaiting tools/call.
```

Clean-baseline retry after clearing stale `SkyComputerUseClient mcp` helpers:

```text
tool call error: tool call failed for `computer-use/get_app_state`

Caused by:
    timed out awaiting tools/call after 120s
```

Corresponding assistant result:

```text
CU_CANARY_RESULT status=failure detail=Computer Use get_app_state for com.google.Chrome timed out after 120s awaiting tools/call.
```

### OpenClaw version

`OpenClaw 2026.6.10`, source build from `openclaw/main` at `7844b0844568f8f71040008ef596bc715064657b`.

### Operating system

macOS 26.5.1 build `25F80`, Apple Silicon (`arm64`).

### Install method

Source checkout / pnpm build in an isolated canary worktree and profile. Node `v26.3.1`.

### Model

`openai/gpt-5.5`

### Provider / routing chain

Discord channel session -> OpenClaw canary gateway -> Codex app-server/runtime -> Computer Use MCP plugin/tool call.

### Additional provider/model setup details

The canary used an isolated `~/.openclaw-canary` profile and loopback gateway port `18799`. Canary auth/profile drift was repaired inside the canary profile so the agent could reach the Codex Computer Use tool. No production gateway/config mutation was used for the canary proof.

### Logs, screenshots, and evidence

Build/version proof:

```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
7844b0844568f8f71040008ef596bc715064657b

$ node -v
v26.3.1

$ sw_vers
ProductName:    macOS
ProductVersion: 26.5.1
BuildVersion:   25F80

$ uname -m
arm64
```

Current-main build and focused Computer Use bridge tests passed before the live canary repro:

```text
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
pnpm build
pnpm exec vitest run \
  extensions/codex/src/app-server/elicitation-bridge.test.ts \
  extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts \
  -t "Computer Use"

Test Files  2 passed
Tests       9 passed
```

Live canary session evidence from the OpenClaw mirrored session log:

```json
{
  "role": "toolResult",
  "toolName": "computer-use.get_app_state",
  "isError": true,
  "content": [
    {
      "content": "{\n  \"message\": \"tool call error: tool call failed for `computer-use/get_app_state`\\n\\nCaused by:\\n    timed out awaiting tools/call after 120s\"\n}"
    }
  ]
}
```

Codex session event evidence for the clean-baseline retry:

```json
{
  "type": "mcp_tool_call_end",
  "invocation": {
    "server": "computer-use",
    "tool": "get_app_state",
    "arguments": {
      "app": "com.google.Chrome"
    }
  },
  "plugin_id": "computer-use@openai-bundled",
  "duration": {
    "secs": 120,
    "nanos": 1085792
  },
  "result": {
    "Err": "tool call error: tool call failed for `computer-use/get_app_state`\n\nCaused by:\n    timed out awaiting tools/call after 120s"
  }
}
```

Clean helper baseline before the final check showed only the service process afterward:

```text
/Users/pollybot/.codex/computer-use/Codex Computer Use.app/Contents/MacOS/SkyComputerUseService
```

Focused duplicate search did not find an exact existing open issue/PR for this new signature:

```text
Searched: "timed out awaiting tools/call", "awaiting tools/call",
"get_app_state", "computer-use/get_app_state", "Computer Use" + "tools/call".

Exact matches: none.
```

Related but not exact:

- `#75696` is the older closed Discord/OpenClaw Computer Use approval-denied issue. This repro gets past that earlier immediate denial shape and fails at the actual MCP `tools/call` completion path.
- `#78303` and `#86079` are approval/elicitation hardening lanes.
- `#93559` and `#81418` are stale/orphan process cleanup lanes.
- `#83966` / `#91266` are dynamic-tool watchdog or approval-timeout-adjacent, but not Computer Use `get_app_state` tool-call completion.

### Impact and severity

Affected: OpenClaw Discord-routed Codex sessions that need Computer Use to operate local Chrome/macOS UI.

Severity: workflow-blocking for GUI/browser tasks through the official Computer Use MCP path. The practical workaround is to avoid `mcp__computer_use` in Discord sessions and use lower-level `usecomputer` screenshot/coordinate loops, Playwright, PinchTab, or manual handoff.

Frequency: 2/2 observed live canary attempts on current main, including one attempt after clearing stale helper clients.

Consequence: agents cannot reliably use the official Computer Use tool from this channel path; the call consumes about 120 seconds and then fails without useful app state.

### Additional information

This is intentionally filed separately from the older approval-denied symptom. The observed current-main failure mode is:

```text
approval/bridge path no longer fails immediately -> MCP Computer Use tools/call starts -> get_app_state does not return -> 120s timeout
```

That makes it likely adjacent to Computer Use MCP tool-call lifecycle/completion rather than only the channel-mediated approval UI.
target.author: PollyBot13
